title: Union Pacific spending over $100M on 20 battery-electric locomotives
text: Union Pacific plans to purchase 20 battery-electric locomotives, which the company says will result in the largest investment in battery-electric technology by a U.S. Class I railroad.  UP (NYSE: UNP) plans to spend more than $100 million to purchase the 20 locomotives and upgrade yard infrastructure.

title: Union Pacific To Buy Battery-Electric Locomotives From Caterpillar, Wabtec
text: Union Pacific Corp (NYSE: UNP) plans to purchase 20 battery-electric locomotives for testing in yard operations. The company expects the combined purchases and upgrades to yard infrastructure to exceed $100 million.

title: Caterpillar to Supply Locomotives to Union Pacific Railroad, Supporting Investment in World's Largest Battery-Electric Locomotive Fleet
text: DEERFIELD, Ill. and OMAHA, Neb.

title: Union Pacific Railroad to Assemble World's Largest Carrier-Owned Battery-Electric Locomotive Fleet
text: OMAHA, Neb., Jan. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Railroad (NYSE: UNP) today announced plans to purchase 20 battery-electric locomotives for testing in yard operations.

title: Union Pacific Railroad Makes Largest Investment in Wabtec's FLXdrive Battery-Electric Locomotive
text: OMAHA, Neb., Jan. 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Railroad (NYSE: UNP) today announced the purchase of 10 FLXdrive battery-electric locomotives from Wabtec Corporation (NYSE: WAB).

title: Union Pacific to buy 10 battery locomotives from Caterpillar
text: Union Pacific Corp plans to buy 10 battery locomotives from Caterpillar Inc, Caterpillar's CFO Andrew Bonfield said in an interview on Friday.

title: Union Pacific's Strong Q4 Will Aid Its Stock Price Growth
text: Union Pacific reported its Q4 results last week, with revenue above, but earnings falling short of our estimates. The company reported revenue of $5.7 billion (up 12% y-o-y), in-line with our forecast and slightly above the consensus estimate of $5.6 billion.

title: Union Pacific Stock Dips, Time to Buy?
text: The railroad gave a positive outlook for its earnings prospects and the U.S. economy in 2022.

title: Jim Cramer says Union Pacific is the best railroad stock to own in this market
text: "This is a stock picker's market, so when it comes to the railroads, you need to stick with the best of breed Union Pacific," the "Mad Money" host said.

title: Loup Logistics Acquires Phoenix Transload Facility
text: OMAHA, Neb., Jan. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Loup Logistics Company (Loup), a wholly owned Union Pacific Railroad subsidiary, today announced the acquisition of the Precision Components Inc. (PCI Reload) transload facility in Phoenix, Arizona.

title: Deutsche Bank Turns Bullish On Saia; Cuts Price Target For CSX, Union Pacific
text: Deutsche Bank analyst Amit Mehrotra updated ratings for three companies in the road and rail sector. The analyst upgraded Saia Inc (NASDAQ:SAIA) to Buy from Hold with an unchanged price target of $363.

title: Union Pacific Has Impressive Pricing Power
text: Union Pacific Corporation ( UNP , Financial) reported fourth-quarter 2021 earnings results last week that came in above what Wall Street analysts had anticipated. Certain product categories had weaker volume, but pricing was up across the board.

title: Union Pacific Corporation (UNP) CEO Lance Fritz on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Union Pacific Corporation (UNP) CEO Lance Fritz on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Union Pacific will beef up intermodal infrastructure in California, Midwest
text: Union Pacific is seeking to bolster its intermodal offerings through capital investments and the implementation of programs meant to encourage loaded outbound international containers, according to comments made by company executives during UP's fourth-quarter 2021 earnings call Thursday. UP's (NYSE: UNP) targeted support of its intermodal franchise comes as the company announced this week that it will be the intermodal carrier for Schneider National's (NASDAQ: SNDR) western U.S. intermodal business, starting in January 2023.

title: Cramer's Investing Club: Strong Q4 at Union Pacific sets up for a solid 2022
text: Various factors, including taking market share from the labor-strapped trucking industry, puts Union Pacific on a strong path this year.

title: Union Pacific (UNP) Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat, Rise Y/Y
text: Union Pacific's (UNP) Q4 results benefit from higher freight revenues owing to positive business mix and pricing gains.

title: Union Pacific CEO: ‘strong pricing environment will continue in 2022'
text: Union Pacific Corp (NYSE: UNP) on Thursday reported better-than-expected results for its fiscal fourth quarter, resulting in a 3.0% increase in the stock price. Highlights from UNP's Q4 earnings report Union Pacific said its net income printed at $1.71 billion that translates to $2.66 per share.

title: Union Pacific (UNP) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Union Pacific (UNP) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.31% and 3.36%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Union Pacific Registers 12% Revenue Growth In Q4, Beats Street View
text: Union Pacific Corp (NYSE: UNP) reported fourth-quarter operating revenue growth of 12% year-over-year to $5.73 billion, above the consensus of $5.62 billion. EPS of $2.66 topped the Street view of $2.61.

title: Union Pacific revenue rises above expectations, to outpace growth in expenses
text: Shares of Union Pacific Corp. UNP, +0.61% were little changed in premarket trading Thursday, after the railroad operator reported fourth-quarter profit and revenue that rose above expectations, as higher fuel surcharges, a positive business mix and price increases helped offset lower volumes as a result of supply chain challenges. Net income increased to $1.71 billion, or $2.66 a share, from $1.38 billion, or $2.05 a share, in the year-ago period, beating the FactSet consensus for earnings per share of $2.61.

title: Union Pacific quarterly profit rises 24% on higher industrial shipments
text: Union Pacific Corp reported a 23.9% rise in quarterly profit on Thursday, helped by higher industrial shipments.

title: Union Pacific Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Results
text: OMAHA, Neb., Jan. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) today reported 2021 fourth quarter net income of $1.7 billion, or $2.66 per diluted share.

title: Schneider Intermodal To Change Western US Rail Partnership To Union Pacific Next Year
text: Schneider National Inc (NYSE: SNDR) is expanding intermodal service by moving its primary western U.S. rail partnership to Union Pacific Corp (NYSE: UNP) in 2023. Deal terms not disclosed.

title: Schneider intermodal moving western rail service to Union Pacific
text: GREEN BAY, Wisc., Jan. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Schneider (NYSE: SNDR), a premier provider of transportation, intermodal and logistics services, announced today the company is expanding intermodal service by moving its primary western United States rail partnership to Union Pacific (NYSE: UNP) beginning in 2023.

title: Union Pacific Railroad and Schneider to Team Up for Intermodal Service in 2023
text: OMAHA, Neb., Jan. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Railroad is pleased to announce it will be the primary intermodal rail transportation provider in the western U.S. for Schneider effective January 2023.

title: Barclays Updates Price Target For Several Transportation Companies
text: Barclays analyst Brandon Oglenski updated the price targets for several transportation companies. The analyst mentions that the pricing remains key as the supply-driven volume recovery likely pushed out for the North American transportation sector.

title: Union Pacific encourages employees to work from home through January
text: U.S. railroad operator Union Pacific Corp said it was encouraging employees to work from home until Jan. 30, as the fast-spreading Omicron variant of the coronavirus forces companies to rethink bringing employees back to office.

title: Will Supply Chain Woes Mar Union Pacific's (UNP) Q4 Earnings?
text: Union Pacific's (UNP) Q4 performance is expected to have been hurt by lower volumes due to supply chain disruptions.

title: Union Pacific Corporation Announces Fourth Quarter 2021 Earnings Release Date
text: OMAHA, Neb., Jan. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Union Pacific Corporation (NYSE: UNP) will release fourth quarter 2021 financial and operating results on Thursday, January 20, 2022, at 8:00 a.m.

title: Wells Fargo Bumps Up Price Targets For Several Transportation Companies
text: Wells Fargo analyst Allison Poliniak-Cusic raised price targets for several transportation companies. The analyst raised GATX Corp's (NYSE:GATX) price target to $120 (an upside of 18%) from $110 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares.
